svg.text: ⏸ HITL 1 — Human in the Loop (Data Review)
graph.invoke() PAUSES here — returns snapshot to Streamlit
On Confirm: graph.update_state(config, edits) → graph.invoke(None, config)
On Cancel: delete Drive file + Firestore record → reset
⏸ HITL 2 — Human in the Loop (Anomaly Review)
Streamlit phase = "anomaly_hitl" — no second graph.invoke needed
Discard: delete Drive file + Firestore record → reset session
